key_evidence: Internet partially restored May 25 after 88-day shutdown (longest national internet shutdown on record); restoration only ~40% of 2026 traffic; WhatsApp restricted
Amnesty (May 20): 39 political executions and 6,000+ arbitrary arrests since the Feb 28 US-Israel attack, including journalists, lawyers, and HRDs
Amnesty 2025 annual report: Iran executed at least 2,159 people in 2025 — 80% of all documented global executions, highest in 44 years
OHCHR: imprisoned protesters face expedited executions
SCALE-FLOOR RULING re-affirmed from 2026-05-28: held at floor-adjacent 2.5; partial internet restoration is reactive, not an improvement signal
methodology_note: SCALE-FLOOR RULING re-affirmed. Iron held at floor-adjacent 2.5 (not absolute 0.0): single dominant extremity (execution rate) plus blackout-during-mass-arrests does not meet the multi-category extremity threshold for absolute floor. Partial/reactive internet restoration (40% of traffic; WhatsApp restricted; shutdown hardware remains installed) is NOT an improvement signal. Inherited score held; no composite movement. Reconstruction of published dims = 2.5 (exact).
